MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Lynn Trieu, is present.
Attorney, Jonathan Bornstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, David Clark and Richard Duffy, are present.
Attorney, Andrew Westley, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tony Schoenberg, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 303A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-02-2011 is vacated.
